SideHustlePlan.title: SideHustlePlan
SideHustlePlan.description: A generated set of realistic, educational side hustle ideas matching user profile inputs.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this generated side hustle plan.

inputs.description: The questionnaire responses containing name, country, ageRange, skills, interests, hoursPerWeek, budget, internetAccess, smartphoneAccess, laptopAccess.

generatedIdeas.description: The list of 5 generated side hustle ideas containing name, difficulty, startupCost, timeRequired, whyMatches, steps, challenges, and resources.

BusinessPlan.title: BusinessPlan
BusinessPlan.description: A generated business concept and launch strategy detailing overview, startup checklist, marketing, pricing, and action plans.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this generated business plan.

businessIdea.description: The user's original business concept or idea.

industry.description: The selected industry category of the proposed business.

generatedPlan.description: The structured business builder plan containing names, description, audience, revenue model, checklist, pricing, launch timeline, and risk assessment.

/side_hustle_plans/{planId}.description: Collection storing the generated side hustle options and step-by-step action plans for users.

/business_plans/{planId}.description: Collection storing the user's customized business concept proposals and launch blueprints.
